step_rationale: Regulates HDL formation and cholesterol efflux capacity, upstream lipid metabolism.
mechanism: ABCA1 mediates reverse cholesterol transport and HDL particle biogenesis, reducing atherosclerotic lipid burden.

references.title: Desmocollin 1 is abundantly expressed in atherosclerosis and impairs high-density lipoprotein biogenesis.
Cholesterol Efflux Pathways Suppress Inflammasome Activation, NETosis, and Atherogenesis.
Saikosaponin-a Attenuates Oxidized LDL Uptake and Prompts Cholesterol Efflux in THP-1 Cells.
